faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Digital marketing & advertising approach focuses on capturing the essential
faq.q1: Why Need Digital Marketing For Build Business ?
faq.a1: Our platform uses state-of-the-art technology to help you generate high-quality content in seconds, tailored to your brand voice.
faq.a2: By leveraging SEO-optimized content and automation, we help you reach a wider audience and drive more organic traffic.
faq.a3: Effective SEO involves technical audits, keyword strategy, and high-quality content creation, all of which our tools assist with.
faq.a4: Yes, our team consists of experts in digital marketing, and software engineering, dedicated to providing the best solutions.
faq.a5: Ernova has a diverse portfolio of global clients across various industries, providing localized solutions that meet international standards of excellence.
faq.q6: How can bias be addressed in AI algorithms?
faq.a6: We address algorithmic bias by using diverse data and implementing rigorous testing to ensure fair and accurate outputs.
faq.q7: Are AI and machine learning the same thing?
faq.a7: While they are related, AI is the broad concept of intelligent machines, whereas machine learning is a subset that focuses on learning from data.
faq.a8: Continuous monitoring and algorithm updates are key to maintaining peak performance in an ever-changing digital landscape.
faq.a9: Technology is designed to augment human capabilities, taking over repetitive tasks so you can focus on more creative and strategic work.
faq.q10: How can I learn more about AI and get in the field?
faq.a10: You can start by exploring our tutorials, blog posts, and documentation to build your knowledge and skills.

about_online_orders.title: Online orders
about_online_orders.desc: Get started online – with your own website and app. More direct orders and up to 20% more profit than with portals.
about_online_orders.feature1_desc: Cut out the high commission fees from third-party portals and keep up to 20% more profit on every single order through your own app and site.
about_online_orders.feature2_desc: Whether you’re a small local shop or a growing chain, our solution grows with you. Add new features, locations, or services anytime without switching systems.

about_pos.title: POS & Payments
about_pos.desc: Streamline your in-store and on-the-go payments with our integrated POS and payment solutions. Accept all major payment methods securely and efficiently.
about_pos.feature1_desc: Accept all major payment methods including credit/debit cards, mobile wallets, and bank transfers. Secure, fast, and reliable transactions every time.
about_pos.feature2_desc: Track your stock levels automatically across all sales channels. Get real-time updates, low-stock alerts, and seamless inventory management to prevent overselling.

about_sales.title: Increase Sales
about_sales.desc: Boost your sales with our powerful marketing tools. Reach more customers, increase conversions, and grow your business.
about_sales.feature1_desc: Run personalized marketing campaigns to engage customers at the right moment. Drive repeat business with targeted promotions and loyalty programs.
about_sales.feature2_desc: Leverage real-time analytics and customer insights to make informed decisions. Understand what drives sales and optimize your strategies for maximum impact.

video_section.title: Boost Your Business with Ernova
video_section.desc: At Ernova, we provide comprehensive digital marketing solutions designed to elevate your brand and drive measurable results. From SEO and content marketing to social media management and web development, our expert team crafts strategies tailored to your unique business goals.
video_section.feature1_desc: We leverage real-time analytics and industry insights to craft data-backed strategies that deliver measurable results. Every decision is informed by data to maximize your ROI.
video_section.feature2_desc: We understand that every business is unique. Our strategies are customized to your specific goals, industry, and target audience for maximum impact.

Imprint.title: Imprint
Imprint.info: Information according to § 5 ECG, § 25 Media Act and § 14 UGB.
Imprint.companyDesc: Ernova provides complete ordering and delivery systems, custom mobile applications, and digital marketing optimizations.
Imprint.disclaimerDesc: The contents of our pages were created with great care. However, we cannot guarantee the correctness, completeness, and topicality of the contents. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages according to the general laws.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: At Ernova, your privacy is our priority. This Privacy Policy outlines the types of information we collect, how we use it, and how we protect your personal data when you use our website or services.
PrivacyPolicy.collectionDesc: We may collect personal details such as your name, email address, phone number, and physical address when you register for our services, contact support, or interact with our site.
PrivacyPolicy.usageDesc: The information we collect is used to provide, maintain, and improve our services to you. We may also use it to communicate with you about updates, promotional offers, and customer support inquiries.
PrivacyPolicy.securityDesc: We implement industry-standard security measures to ensure that your personal information is kept safe from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

CookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
CookiePolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Ernova uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website.
CookiePolicy.whatDesc: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used by website owners in order to make their websites work, or to work more efficiently.
CookiePolicy.whyDesc: We use first-party and third-party cookies for several reasons. Some cookies are required for technical reasons in order for our website to operate.
CookiePolicy.controlDesc: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can exercise your cookie rights by setting your preferences in your browser.

GrowBusiness.descShort: Elevate your brand with our innovative growth strategies and custom digital solutions.

Faq.subtitle: Some Question
Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.q1: How can Ernova help my restaurant grow?
Faq.a1: Ernova provides an all-in-one digital ordering system, mobile apps, and POS integration to streamline your operations and increase direct sales by up to 20%.
Faq.q2: Is it easy to integrate Ernova with my existing POS?
Faq.a2: Yes, our system is designed to seamlessly integrate with major POS systems, ensuring real-time inventory and order synchronization across all channels.
Faq.q3: Do I get my own branded mobile app?
Faq.a3: Absolutely! We build white-label iOS and Android apps specifically for your brand, allowing your customers to order directly without portal commission fees.
Faq.q4: How does the online ordering system work?
Faq.a4: Your customers can browse your menu and place orders through your website or app. Orders are sent directly to your kitchen or POS, reducing errors and saving time.
Faq.q5: What kind of support does Ernova offer?
Faq.a5: We provide 24/7 technical support and a dedicated account manager to help you optimize your digital presence and ensure everything runs smoothly.
